description:
To invite church members as portal users, the system needs to be able to send them a welcome email with login instructions. This requires an outgoing email account to be configured.

**What you'll need:**
- An email address to send from (e.g. noreply@yourchurch.org)
- Your email provider SMTP server, port, and credentials

**Steps:**
1. Click **Set Up Email Account** below.
2. Enter your email address and follow the setup wizard.
3. Make sure to check **Default Outgoing** so the system knows which account to use.

You can skip this step and configure email later, but portal invitations will not work until it is set up.
name: Email Configuration
title: Email Configuration
